_comment: Role -> board identity. The NORMATIVE source for these MACs is
docs/CONTAINER.md §6; this file is the machine-readable copy that
tools/dev.ps1 and tests/e2e/conftest.py both read, so the mapping exists
Bind roles to MAC, never to a port number: ports re-enumerate, and
flashing the wrong role onto the wrong board produces a system that looks
broken in a very confusing way.
Board A's SoftAP BSSID is its base MAC + 1 (14:63:93:8d:98:75), which is a
useful cross-check when identifying which board is advertising.
